name: Create Agent
description: Create a new GSANE agent with best practices and compliance

name: Edit Agent
description: Edit existing GSANE agents while maintaining compliance

name: Validate Agent
description: Validate existing GSANE agents and offer to improve deficiencies

name: Create Module Brief
description: Create product brief for GSANE module development

name: Create Module
description: Create a complete GSANE module with agents, workflows, and infrastructure

name: Edit Module
description: Edit existing GSANE modules while maintaining coherence

name: Validate Module
description: Run compliance check on GSANE modules against best practices

name: Create Workflow
description: Create a new GSANE workflow with proper structure and best practices

name: Edit Workflow
description: Edit existing GSANE workflows while maintaining integrity

name: Validate Workflow
description: Run validation check on GSANE workflows against best practices

name: Max Parallel Validate
description: Run validation checks in MAX-PARALLEL mode against a workflow requires a tool that supports Parallel Sub-Processes

name: Rework Workflow
description: Rework a Workflow to a V6 Compliant Version

name: Innovation Strategy
description: Identify disruption opportunities and architect business model innovation. Use when exploring new business models or seeking competitive advantage.

name: Problem Solving
description: Apply systematic problem-solving methodologies to crack complex challenges. Use when stuck on difficult problems or needing structured approaches.

name: Design Thinking
description: Guide human-centered design processes using empathy-driven methodologies. Use for user-centered design challenges or improving user experience.

name: Brainstorming
agent-command: gsane:builds on ideas with YES AND:agent:brainstorming-coach
description: Facilitate brainstorming sessions using one or more techniques. Use early in ideation phase or when stuck generating ideas.

name: Storytelling
description: Craft compelling narratives using proven story frameworks and techniques. Use when needing persuasive communication or story-driven content.

name: Brainstorming
description: Generate diverse ideas through interactive techniques. Use early in ideation phase or when stuck generating ideas.

name: Party Mode
description: Orchestrate multi-agent discussions. Use when you need multiple agent perspectives or want agents to collaborate.

name: gsane-help
description: Get unstuck by showing what workflow steps come next or answering Gsane Method questions.

name: Index Docs
description: Create lightweight index for quick LLM scanning. Use when LLM needs to understand available docs without loading everything.

name: Shard Document
description: Split large documents into smaller files by sections. Use when doc becomes too large (>500 lines) to manage effectively.

name: Editorial Review - Prose
description: Review prose for clarity, tone, and communication issues. Use after drafting to polish written content.
outputs: three-column markdown table with suggested fixes

name: Editorial Review - Structure
description: Propose cuts, reorganization, and simplification while preserving comprehension. Use when doc produced from multiple subprocesses or needs structural improvement.

name: Adversarial Review (General)
description: Review content critically to find issues and weaknesses. Use for quality assurance or before finalizing deliverables. Code Review in other modules run this automatically, but its useful also for document reviews

name: Edge Case Hunter Review
description: Walk every branching path and boundary condition in code, report only unhandled edge cases. Use alongside adversarial review for orthogonal coverage - method-driven not attitude-driven.

name: Teach Me Testing
agent-title: 🧪 Master Test Architect and Quality Advisor
description: Teach testing fundamentals through 7 sessions (TEA Academy)

name: Test Design
agent-title: 🧪 Master Test Architect and Quality Advisor
description: Risk-based test planning

name: Test Framework
agent-title: 🧪 Master Test Architect and Quality Advisor
description: Initialize production-ready test framework

name: CI Setup
agent-title: 🧪 Master Test Architect and Quality Advisor
description: Configure CI/CD quality pipeline

name: ATDD
agent-title: 🧪 Master Test Architect and Quality Advisor
description: Generate failing tests (TDD red phase)

name: Test Automation
agent-title: 🧪 Master Test Architect and Quality Advisor
description: Expand test coverage

name: Test Review
agent-title: 🧪 Master Test Architect and Quality Advisor
description: Quality audit (0-100 scoring)

name: NFR Assessment
agent-title: 🧪 Master Test Architect and Quality Advisor
description: Non-functional requirements

name: Traceability
agent-title: 🧪 Master Test Architect and Quality Advisor
description: Coverage traceability and gate

name: Completion Contract
description: Run the 20-point Completion Contract before declaring any task done. Checks git, CHANGELOG, quality, manifests, and CI.

name: Session Branch
description: Verify or create the correct feature/fix branch before starting any work session. Prevents accidental commits to main.

name: Optimize GSANE
description: Analyze token usage, session patterns, and drive continuous framework improvement. Use when you want to audit session efficiency or optimize GSANE configurations.

name: QA GSANE
description: Validate GSANE artifacts for quality and detect regressions. Use when you want to check agent consistency, workflow compliance, or manifest sync.
